deals.headline: $79 discounted account observed
deals.description: A $79 discounted Tradeify account was purchased by the TradingToolsHub founder on July 15. The eligible account size, product, code and expiry still need confirmation at checkout.
deals.billing: One-time offer reported; exact product terms pending

deals.headline: One-time evaluation access terms checked
deals.description: Apex explains evaluation plan access as a one-time payment for a 30-day access period, with PA activation required after passing. Promotion levels change often, so the exact discount still needs checkout verification before we publish a price.
deals.billing: Reported as one-time with no rebill; official verification pending

deals.headline: No recurring fees claim checked
deals.description: Lucid positions its futures accounts around instant funding, same-day payouts and no recurring fees. The exact current discount and account-size pricing still need checkout verification before a numeric offer is shown.
deals.billing: Official site says no recurring fees; current promotion requires checkout verification

deals.headline: Direct Qualified pricing checked
deals.description: Alpha Futures publishes Direct Qualified pricing on its site, including 50K, 100K and larger account paths. Promotion labels and full checkout terms should still be checked at purchase time.
deals.billing: Published account pricing; discount and checkout terms may change
